transcript.clean_text: stage 19 of the jedi italia the start of three days that would decide the destination of the maliarosa and the neverending trophy in milan on sunday abiate grasso finishing in alperimera for the first time ever in the history of the judo italia a slightly altered course after the very sad disaster that happened in motarone last week and a first category climb to finish it to alpenibera 166 kilometers an opportunity for a fast and furious race that's exactly what we got from the start groups going away being pulled back before it all started again took almost 50 kilometers for things to settle down six riders would get up the road but bike exchange wouldn't give them any leeway maximum gap of four and a half minutes and already into the final 70 kilometers a split occurring on the descent with idiosa pressing on and panic for the ineos grenadiers danny martinez missing the split being brought back with just 60 k's to go by philippe gana another domestique the most valuable one returning for again bernal he proved to be very useful final climb 10 kilometers long average gradient right up there at 10 percent the current quick step will bring back the break mark christian the manxman the last survivor and what james knox have finished his excellent work joao almeida would slip away from the front of the bunch but then simon yates attacked with six and a half k's to go karoozo would follow and you wondered how bernal was feeling gap began to open up yates then attacking the rest of that group and looking like we might be able to drop another bomb on the jira d'italia but bernal did not panic he had first caster robiejo then danny martinez mccarthy would be dropped out the back of the chasing group vlassov also having to work his way back on they're now finally isolated with just two and a half days to go initially looking pretty good kaduzo would lose a little bit of that distance yates increasing his gap and then bernal dropped inside the final 500 meters or so by almeida and what was 20 seconds was extended to 30 seconds yates taking his stage win just under half a minute over bernal with almeida sandwiched in the middle finally a victory for bike exchange who rode all day for it bernal saving the day well and even extending his lead from first to second but seeing that lead cut by over half a minute from yates so more question marks over the gc well defended to now by bernal but simon yates taking a stage win and dreaming of even more dan martin's ride taking him into the top 10 as well all in all but have to say job well done 229 in his gap to caruso just 20 seconds further back there was simon yates nobody else for now seemingly threatening unless there's a big clack vlassov in fourth karthian fifth but at seven minutes ten seconds so the last road stage of the churro of italia a five-star stage leaving verbanian piante heading into lombardy then into switzerland before returning to lombardy for the grand finale three mighty mountains to take on paso san bernardino then they returned to italy over the splurging pass and it's a finish for the first time up at alpe di motta just above the town of madeisimo 164 kilometers over 2000 meters twice the giro is in play and don't forget the 30 kilometer time trial on the final day but now looking good for now is he defending and playing it safe or is there something else under the skin you have to tune in to find out two days to go it's all up for grabs at the always unpredictable italian
